hero.name: Lounes Badji
hero.title: Lead Front-End Developer & Full Stack Engineer
hero.subtitle: Passionate about software development with deep expertise in SaaS, DDD/CQRS, and modern architectures.

about.title: About Me
about.description: A CPE Lyon engineering graduate, I am a passionate Full Stack developer with over 8 years of experience in designing and developing innovative software solutions. I have worked for renowned companies like Louis Vuitton, Agicap, and Tessi, bringing my expertise in modern architectures and SaaS development.

lv.description: Developed digital solutions for the French luxury house. Designed performant and maintainable front-end architectures for internal tools and customer experiences.

tessi.description: Technical leadership of front-end development. Implementing scalable architectures, systematic code reviews, and mentoring a team of developers.

agicap.description: Full Stack development of the cash management platform. Implemented DDD/CQRS patterns for a robust and scalable architecture.

tessi.description: Technical leadership of front-end development, implementing scalable architectures and team mentoring.

globaz.description: Development of SaaS software solutions for the social insurance sector in Switzerland.

agicap.description: Full Stack development of the cash management platform. Implementation of DDD/CQRS patterns and improvement of team cohesion.

mygladys.description: Technical leadership and development of the digital concierge platform.

icoges.description: Teaching web development and modern technologies to students.

ubilab.description: Leading front-end development and implementing modern React architectures.

trainme.description: Mobile application development for the sports coaching platform.

chartreux.field: Integrated preparatory classes for CPE Lyon

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.subtitle: Interested in my profile? Don't hesitate to reach out!

chatbot.title: CV Assistant
chatbot.placeholder: Ask a question about my CV...
chatbot.greeting: Hello! I'm Lounes's assistant. Ask me about his background, skills, or experience!
chatbot.fallback: I'm not sure I understand your question. Here's what I can tell you about: career path, technical skills, education, companies (Louis Vuitton, Tessi, Agicap...), methodologies, leadership, or how to contact Lounes.

responses.experience: Lounes has over 8 years of experience. He is currently Lead Front-End Developer at Tessi. Previously, he worked at GLOBAZ SA, Agicap, Louis Vuitton, MyGladys, ICOGES (as a teacher), Ubilab.io, and TrainMe.
responses.skills: Lounes is proficient in React, Next.js, Angular, TypeScript, Node.js, Java, NestJS. He is an expert in DDD/CQRS architectures, microservices, and Clean Architecture. He also practices Docker, CI/CD, and agile methodologies.
responses.education: Lounes holds an engineering degree from CPE Lyon (School of Chemistry, Physics, and Electronics of Lyon). He completed his preparatory classes at Institution des Chartreux and his baccalauréat at Lycée Saint Just.
responses.location: Lounes is based in the Lyon area, France.
responses.lv: At Louis Vuitton (Nov 2019 - Nov 2021), Lounes developed digital solutions for the luxury house, focusing on quality and technical excellence.
responses.agicap: At Agicap (Nov 2021 - Aug 2022), Lounes worked as a Full Stack developer on the cash management platform, implementing DDD/CQRS patterns.
responses.current: Currently, Lounes is Lead Front-End Developer at Tessi, where he leads front-end development and implements scalable architectures.
responses.github: Lounes has 60+ repositories on GitHub. His profile is github.com/badjilounes.
responses.languages: Lounes primarily works with TypeScript, JavaScript, and Java.
responses.teaching: Lounes was a teacher at ICOGES (Feb 2018 - Feb 2019), where he taught web development and modern technologies.
responses.hello: Hello! I'm Lounes's virtual assistant. How can I help you? You can ask me about his career, skills, professional experience, or education.
responses.contact: You can reach Lounes via LinkedIn (linkedin.com/in/lounes-badji-01b550104) or GitHub (github.com/badjilounes). Feel free to contact him directly to discuss opportunities.
responses.strength: Lounes's key strengths: full stack technical expertise, team leadership, mastery of DDD/CQRS architectures, ability to challenge practices to improve quality, and solid experience at prestigious companies like Louis Vuitton.
responses.availability: Lounes is currently working at Tessi as Lead Front-End Developer. To discuss opportunities, feel free to reach out via LinkedIn.
responses.methodology: Lounes practices agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban) and is a strong advocate for DDD (Domain-Driven Design) and CQRS. He emphasizes code quality, code reviews, and test-driven development.
responses.frontend: On the front-end, Lounes masters React, Next.js, Angular, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS, Redux, and RxJS. He has particular expertise in React and its ecosystems.
responses.backend: On the back-end, Lounes works with Node.js, Java, NestJS, Express, REST API, and GraphQL. He has solid experience in API development and microservices architecture.
responses.saas: Lounes has deep expertise in SaaS development. He contributed to SaaS platforms at Agicap (cash management) and GLOBAZ SA (social insurance).
responses.leadership: Lounes has held several leadership positions: Lead Front-End Developer at Tessi, Lead Software Engineer at MyGladys, and Lead Front Developer at Ubilab.io. He excels at mentoring and upskilling teams.
responses.globaz: At GLOBAZ SA (Nov 2022 - Apr 2023), Lounes developed SaaS software solutions for the social insurance sector in Switzerland.
responses.mygladys: At MyGladys (Dec 2018 - Jun 2019), Lounes led the development of the digital concierge platform as Lead Software Engineer.
responses.ubilab: At Ubilab.io (Sep 2016 - Dec 2018), Lounes led front-end development and implemented modern React architectures as Lead Front Developer.
responses.trainme: At TrainMe (Feb 2016 - Jul 2016), Lounes developed mobile applications for the sports coaching platform.
